form.formComment: Second-up. Promising on debut 2nd of 12 at Newbury 3yo Mdn Sw on April 12 over 1600m, head behind Point Of Contact carrying 60.5kg at $26. Went for a break before returning favourite; won by 2.5 len at Chelmsford March 7 over 1400m defeating Different Opinions with 64.5kg at $1.50. Only needs to hold that form to be winning again. Still has scope for improvement and is among the better hopes.

formComments.title: TAB

Still has scope for improvement and is among the better hopes.

form.formComment: Jumped at big odds at debut, ran last of 8 at Pontefract on April 7 over 1600m, 33 len behind Haayimm with 64.5kg at $34. Doubt he will trouble these.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell after only one run when won by 0.5 len at Kempton Park All Weather November 5 over 1400m defeating Media Legend carrying 60.5kg at $17. One of the better chances.

form.formComment: Resuming after a break; only one run when favourite; won by 1.0 len at Doncaster November 8 over 1200m on a heavy track defeating Angel Gabriel carrying 60.5kg at $1.90. Great chance to make it two for two.

form.formComment: Resuming after a six-and-a-half months break. Not seen since he finished last of 26 at Newmarket (Rowley) October 4 over 1400m, 51 len behind Jel Pepper carrying 56.5kg at $26. On debut second last in a small field at Newbury July 19 over 1200m, 6 len behind Egoli with 58kg at $9. Improvement to come and looks hard to beat.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Not seen since he finished last of 8 at Newbury October 24 over 1300m, soft track; 17 len behind Needle Match with 60.5kg at $7.50. On debut sixth of 8 at Salisbury October 2 over 1400m, 8 len behind Illy's Roo with 60.5kg at $2.50. Sure to have improved over the break so he can feature.

form.formComment: Raced two times to date. At long odds at debut, 6th of 10 at Chelmsford on March 12 over 1400m, 11 len behind Denver Doll carrying 58kg at $34. Last start ran last of 7 at Kempton Park All Weather on April 1 over 1400m, 10 len behind Nanoscience with 58kg at $126. Rank outsider.
